title: 360 Degree Fire Protection System
description: Autonomous fire detection and suppression system using 4 flame sensors in 90° quadrant arrangement, Arduino Mega computes fire azimuth, aims pan-tilt water nozzle, and opens solenoid valve for targeted suppression.
objective: 360° coverage; detect fire in < 500 ms; aim nozzle to ±5° accuracy; 2 s water burst suppression; buzzer + LED alarm; manual override.
constraints: 12 V solenoid valve; 2× MG996R servos; Arduino Mega; 4× YG1006 sensors; BOM < ₹3000.
design_element_titles: 360-Degree Fire Protection — Pan-Tilt Nozzle with Flame Sensor Array
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.360-Degree Fire Protection — Pan-Tilt No: 4× YG1006 at 90° intervals; MG996R pan-tilt gimbal aims nozzle; solenoid valve opens on confirmed detection.
